case_title: CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT, VS. JIN, QUAN SHENG DBA BEIJING RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT, AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF  INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS, ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT JIN, QUAN SHENG DBA BEIJING RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
